tools.name: analyze_decision
tools.description: Adversarially audit a decision for cognitive biases. Returns a directive YOUR model executes to produce the composed audit (verdict-first). Provide reasoning, not just the conclusion.

tools.name: list_biases
tools.description: List the 22-bias catalogue, optionally filtered by family.

tools.name: get_bias
tools.description: Get the full entry for one bias by id.
